---
title: "st. schwarz"
subtitle: |
  linguistics / komparatistik / DH
image: /assets/images/dcl-head-niemand.png
format:
  html:
    grid:
      body-width: 800px
about:
  id: edu-exp
  template: solana
  image: /assets/images/fadenlogo-fwb.png
  image-width: 6em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: '{{< iconify fa7-solid:envelope title="Envelope logo for email" label="Envelope logo for email" >}}'
      href: "mailto:#"
      aria-label: "Envelope logo for email"
    # - text: '{{< iconify fa7-brands:orcid title="ORCID logo linking to Mickaël CANOUIL ORCID account" label="ORCID logo linking to Mickaël CANOUIL ORCID account" >}}'
    #   href: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3396-4549"
    #   aria-label: "ORCID logo linking to Mickaël CANOUIL ORCID account"
    #   target: _blank
    #   rel: noopener noreferrer
    # - text: '{{< iconify fa7-brands:bluesky title="BlueSky logo linking to mickael.canouil.fr account" label="BlueSky logo linking to mickael.canouil.fr account" >}}'
    #   href: "https://bsky.app/profile/mickael.canouil.fr"
    #   aria-label: "BlueSky logo linking to mickael.canouil.fr account"
    #   target: _blank
    #   rel: noopener noreferrer
    - text: '{{< iconify fa7-brands:linkedin title="LinkedIn logo linking to st. schwarz account" label="LinkedIn logo linking to st. schwarz account" >}}'
      href: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/#"
      aria-label: "LinkedIn logo linking to st. schwarz account"
      target: _blank
      rel: noopener noreferrer
    # - text: '{{< iconify fa7-brands:mastodon title="Mastodon logo linking to MickaelCanouil Fosstodon account" label="Mastodon logo linking to MickaelCanouil Fosstodon account" >}}'
    #   href: "https://fosstodon.org/@MickaelCanouil"
    #   aria-label: "Mastodon logo linking to MickaelCanouil Fosstodon account"
    #   rel: me noopener noreferrer
    #   target: _blank
    - text: '{{< iconify octicon:mark-github-16 title="GitHub logo linking to esteeschwarz account" label="GitHub logo linking to esteeschwarz account" >}}'
      href: "https://github.com/esteeschwarz"
      aria-label: "GitHub logo linking to esteeschwarz"
      target: _blank
      rel: noopener noreferrer
    # - text: '{{< iconify octicon:heart-fill-16 title="GitHub Sponsor mcanouil" label="GitHub Sponsor mcanouil" >}} Sponsor'
    #   href: "https://github.com/sponsors/mcanouil?o=esb"
    #   aria-label: "GitHub Sponsor mcanouil"
    #   target: _blank
    #   rel: noopener noreferrer
---

:::: {#edu-exp}
:::

:::: {.about-body}

<del>I am a linguist consultant in __*Biostatistics*__ and a __*freelance*__ developer specialising in the Quarto and R ecosystems.  
I combine expertise in genetics and multi-omics analysis with open-source development, bridging academic/private research with practical tool creation.</del>

:::: {.highlight}

<del>I am __*available*__ for both short-term and extended engagements on __*Quarto related projects*__.</del>

<!-- :::

I also enjoy watching movies (![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings/main/media/imdb.svg){fig-alt="Movies seen count"}) and playing with {{< iconify fa7-brands:r-project title="R" label="R" >}}.

:::: {.light-content}

![Source: [github.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings](https://github.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings/main/media/streak-light.svg){fig-alt="Movies seen in a movie theatre year streak" .img-styled .nolightbox}

:::

:::: {.dark-content}

![Source: [github.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings](https://github.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mcanouil/imdb-ratings/main/media/streak-dark.svg){fig-alt="Movies seen in a movie theatre year streak" .img-styled .nolightbox}
 -->
:::

## {{< iconify octicon:briefcase-24 >}} What I Do

<del>I translate complex biostatistical challenges into elegant, user-friendly solutions.
My work spans multi-omics data analysis (*e.g.*, genetics, proteomics, metabolomics, transcriptomics, *etc.*) mostly in a research setting, R package development, and Quarto ecosystem contributions.
</del>
## {{< iconify octicon:beaker-24 >}} Research & Publications

:::: {.highlight}

__see link in__ [projects](projects.qmd).

<!-- :::

I have published 49 peer-reviewed papers in top-tier journals including Nature and Nature Genetics, with my most recent [co-last author publication in Nature Communications (2024)](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-53687-3) presenting a framework for GWAS[^gwas] using repeated measures data.

[^gwas]: Genome-Wide Association Studies. -->

<!-- ## {{< iconify octicon:code-24 >}} Open Source Contributions -->

<!-- :::: {.highlight}

Creator of the __*[Quarto Extensions Directory](https://m.canouil.dev/quarto-extensions/)*__, __*[Quarto Wizard](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-wizard)*__ Visual Studio Code extension, and __*[Awesome Quarto](https://github.com/mcanouil/awesome-quarto)*__ repository, with __*15+ Quarto extensions*__ developed.

:::

I have developed a few {{< iconify fa7-brands:r-project title="R" label="R" >}}&nbsp;packages (_e.g._,&nbsp;[insane](https://github.com/mcanouil/insane), [NACHO](https://github.com/mcanouil/NACHO)), and although some are not very useful, they are most definitely entertaining (_i.e._,&nbsp;[ggpacman](https://github.com/mcanouil/ggpacman)).

I created the [Quarto Extensions Directory](https://m.canouil.dev/quarto-extensions/), the [Quarto Wizard](https://github.com/mcanouil/quarto-wizard) Visual Studio Code extension, and have developed 15+ Quarto extensions.
My [Awesome Quarto repository](https://github.com/mcanouil/awesome-quarto) serves as a comprehensive resource for the Quarto community. -->

:::
## {{< iconify octicon:mortar-board-24 >}} Teaching

I have developed class tutorial workflows covering archiving and building upon corpora from digitized written and spoken material.

## {{< iconify octicon:tools-24 >}} Technical Skills {.interests}

- content management
- layout / editorial work
- TEI conventional corpus building oral/written sources
- correctorat
- R
- Rust
- iOS/Mac app development
- server administration, webdesign
- french+, russian- / hebrew- language


## {{< iconify octicon:star-24 >}} Interests {.interests}

- corpus linguistics
- discourse analysis
- archiving
- data analysis & visualisation, QDA
- reproducible / open source research
- distant reading approaches to literature

## {{< iconify octicon:mortar-board-24 >}} Education {.education}

- **Studium** (*Linguistik, Komparatistik; B.A.*), **2025-**  
  *FUB*

- **Studium** (*Linguistik, Komparatistik, Hebräisch; B.A.*), **2023-2025**  
  *FUB*

- **Studium** (*Linguistik, Komparatistik, Informatik; B.A.*), **2019-2023**  
  *FUB*

- **Gärtnermeister** (*Friedhofsgartenbau*), **2018**  

- **Ausbildung** (*Zierpflanzenbau*), **2005-2008**  

- **Studium** (*Politikwissenschaften, Psychologie, Erziehungswissenschaften; M.A.*), **2000-2003**  
  *Fernuniversität in Hagen*

- **Studium** (*Germanistik, Politikwissenschaften; Lehramt*), **1998-2000**  
  *FUB*

:::
